description: You are a 6th-grade science student using your OLPC laptop to create an astronomy assignment in the Sugar Write activity. Create an illustrated science report titled 'Galilean Moons of Jupiter' that lists the four Galilean moons (Io: 3643 km, Europa: 3121 km, Ganymede: 5268 km, Callisto: 4821 km) sorted in descending order by diameter. For each moon, include its name, diameter, and its corresponding image from /home/ga/Documents/moons/ below the text. Save the completed report as an ODT file to /home/ga/Documents/jupiter_moons.odt.
